mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id AS "orderId", invoice_number AS "invoiceNumber", total_amount AS "totalAmount", tax_amount AS "taxAmount", status, gstin, created_time AS "createdAt" FROM invoices AND order_id = #{orderId}AND status = #{status}AND LOWER(invoice_number) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%',#{invoiceNumber},'%')) ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM invoices AND status = #{status}
